title: Immunocytochemistry of primary neurons
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"evs2q","text":"This protocol describes the steps to obtain a great staining of primary neurons. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"bif9m","text":"Blocking Solution: 1% BSA , 50mM Glycine , 2% FBS/Goat Normal Serum/ Donkey Normal Serum, 0,1% TRITON X-100 in PBS1X. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":19}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"a4b74","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4cc49","text":"Working Solution:  Blocking Solution in   PBS1X","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":18}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":18,"length":1},{"key":1,"offset":40,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"8caou","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"10","error":false,"guid":"81BB6290144E11EEA36507BD7B3FC9B4","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}},"1":{"type":"amount","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"amount":"40","error":false,"guid":"8581B960144E11EEA36507BD7B3FC9B4","id":0,"label":"","scientificNotation":false,"unit":2}}}}
steps: Fix cells with paraformaldehyde (PFA) 4% for 00:30:00 at room temperature
Permeabilize cells with 0.3% Triton X-100 (in PBS1X) for 00:05:00 at room temperature
Wash cells with PBS1X for 00:05:00 for three times at room temperature
Saturate cells in blocking solution for at least 00:30:00
Wash cells with PBS1X for 00:05:00 for three times at room temperature
Incubate with primary antibody in working solution for 01:30:00 at room temperature
Wash cells with PBS1X for 00:05:00 for three times at room temperature
Wash cells in working solution for 00:05:00 for three times at room temperature
Incubate with secondary antibody in working solution for 01:00:00 at room temperature in the dark
Wash cells in working solution for 00:05:00 for three times at room temperature
Wash cells in PBS1X for 00:01:00 for three times at room temperature
Mount the coverslips on slides with mounting medium
creator: Giulia Tombesi
